title: 'Kill network': China sees red as Japan deploys upgraded long-range Type-12 missiles
content: China's PLA has condemned Japan's planned deployment of upgraded Type-12 missiles, warning of a "kill network" targeting coastal and inland areas. This move, aimed at deterring China in a Taiwan conflict, expands Japan's long-range strike capabilities, raising regional tensions.

title: ‘Don’t just say ED, ED, ED’: SC questions Bengal govt in Mamata I-PAC raid case
content: The Supreme Court questioned West Bengal's objection to the ED's plea alleging obstruction by Chief Minister Mamata Banerjee during a raid. Justices emphasized the fundamental rights of individual ED officers, urging the state to focus on their alleged victimhood rather than just the agency.

title: Google DeepMind VP has national security reminder for staff on Pentagon partnership
content: Google DeepMind is significantly increasing its involvement in national security contracts, a shift confirmed by a VP. The company has revised its AI principles, removing previous restrictions on weapons development and surveillance, now prioritizing benefits over risks.

title: 'Dhurandhar 2' box office Day 6: Ranveer Singh film eyes Rs 650 cr India gross milestone
content: 'Dhurandhar 2: The Revenge' continues its historic dominance at the box office, amassing a staggering Rs. 844.76 crore in worldwide gross collections. This global haul is fueled by a robust Rs. 619.76 crore from the domestic Indian market and a powerful Rs. 225.00 crore from overseas territories. Currently, the high-octane sequel has already secured a domestic net collection of Rs. 519.12 crore, firmly establishing it as one of the fastest Indian films to reach these elite milestones.

title: When will Iran's regime fall? Here's what Mossad chief said
content: Mossad chief David Barnea reportedly presented a nuanced view on Iran's regime change, suggesting it was possible but likely a year-long process, not a swift collapse. This assessment, emphasizing conditions and time, contrasts with claims of expecting rapid uprisings. Recent statements indicate the Iranian regime remains intact but weakened.

title: After Shanaka & Blessing, third foreign player leaves PSL, is he CSK bound?
content: The 33-year-old right-arm fast bowler withdrew from the PSL last week, and Pakistani news outlet Geo Super reported on Tuesday that the PSL franchise Hyderabad Kingsmen are weighing up their options to replace Baartman.

title: H-1B visa registrations dip 30-50%: List of cos emerging as ‘favourites’ in new system
content: H-1B visa registrations for FY27 have plummeted by 30-50%, driven by higher fees and a new lottery prioritizing wages. This shift benefits mid-tier IT firms and US Master's graduates, while large outsourcing companies face reduced dominance. The recalibration signals a move towards quality talent and increased costs for employers.

title: Harish Rana, India's first passive euthanasia case, dies after 13 years in vegetative state
content: India's first passive euthanasia recipient, Harish Rana, passed away at AIIMS-Delhi after 13 years in a vegetative state. The Supreme Court had permitted the withdrawal of life support, allowing a dignified end. This case reignited the debate on 'letting a patient die' versus actively ending life, highlighting the legal and ethical complexities surrounding end-of-life decisions.

title: Alcohol, betrayal and more: How ‘lover’ plotted murder in UP, beheads Delhi woman
content: A Delhi woman, Babli Devi, was brutally murdered in Bulandshahr. Police discovered her body near a canal. Her lover, Vikas, and two others allegedly beheaded her. Babli's family identified her through a social media post. Vikas, who had a relationship with Babli after her husband's death, is the prime accused. He has been arrested along with an accomplice.

title: PM Modi compares fuel crisis to Covid-19 in Parl; Rahul says 'don't forget the deaths'
content: Rahul Gandhi criticized PM Modi's comparison of the current fuel crisis to the Covid-19 pandemic, highlighting the tragic loss of life during the pandemic. He also accused Modi of compromising India's foreign policy and questioned the government's handling of the West Asia conflict and the stranded Indian ships.

title: US bans another 'made-in-China' gadget
content: America's FCC has added all foreign-made home routers to a security risk list. This action targets Chinese-made electronics over safety concerns. The ban prevents new routers from entering the US market. This move follows previous import bans on Chinese drones. Routers connect homes to the internet and are crucial for national security.

title: Who is Kal Somani? The US entrepreneur leading $1.63bn RR buy
content: Ahead of IPL 2026, Rajasthan Royals have been acquired for $1.63 billion by a consortium led by US entrepreneur Kal Somani, making it a landmark deal. Somani, a tech entrepreneur, is backed by major global investors like Rob Walton and Sheila Ford Hamp. The move highlights growing IPL value, with Somani expressing strong belief in the league’s future potential.

title: R Madhavan clarifies after FIR over Dhurandhar 2, says he put out cigarette
content: A controversy erupted over a scene in 'Dhurandhar 2' featuring R Madhavan and Ranveer Singh, with a Shiv Sena leader filing an FIR for alleged disrespect to Gurbani. Madhavan has since clarified, stating the scene was misunderstood and that he extinguished his cigarette before reciting sacred lines, emphasizing respect for the Sikh community.

title: Kashmiri separatist Asiya Andrabi gets life imprisonment in UAPA case
content: Kashmiri separatist leader Asiya Andrabi has been sentenced to life imprisonment by a Delhi court under the UAPA. Her associates, Fehmeeda and Nasreen, received 30-year sentences in the same case. The convictions stem from charges including waging war against India and promoting enmity.

title: Kal Somani-led consortium buys Rajasthan Royals for $1.63 billion
content: US entrepreneur Kal Somani, backed by the Walton and Hamp families, has secured ownership of the Rajasthan Royals franchise for $1.63 billion. This significant acquisition marks a new chapter for the IPL team.

title: Ram Navami 2026: Date set for March 27; madhyahna muhurat 11:13 AM–1:41 PM
content: Ram Navami, celebrating the birth of Lord Shri Ram, the seventh incarnation of Lord Vishnu, will be observed on March 26, 2026. This prominent Hindu festival marks the end of Chaitra Navratri and is observed with prayers, recitations of Ramacharitmanas, and acts of charity, honoring Lord Rama's ideals of morality, truth, and justice.

title: From cheapest to one of the costliest: RR sees 2,332.84% jump in value in 19 years
content: Rajasthan Royals’ valuation has surged from $67 million in 2008 to $1.63 billion in 2026, marking a 2,332.84 percent rise. Once the cheapest IPL franchise, they are now among the most valuable, reflecting the league’s explosive financial growth and strong investor interest.

title: All about the actor who played Shirani Baloch in 'Dhurandhar: The Revenge'
content: Aditya Dhar's spy thriller storms box office with Ranveer Singh, Arjun Rampal. Bimal Oberoi, actor-producer (PK, Tiger 3), plays radical leader inspired by Maulana Shirani & Akbar Bugti. Short but powerful role adds tension.

title: Electric bus powered by diesel! Here's why this video is going viral
content: A viral video shows an electric bus charging via a diesel generator, raising questions about the environmental benefits of EVs when their power source isn't clean. This highlights a critical gap in charging infrastructure and the need for renewable energy to make electric mobility truly sustainable.

title: 'Modi may not be PM by 2026 end': Arvind Kejriwal at Sanjay Raut book launch
content: Arvind Kejriwal predicted Prime Minister Narendra Modi might not remain in office beyond 2026, citing a decline in popularity and alleged electoral "corruption." Opposition leaders at a book launch echoed concerns about institutions like the EC and ED, with Derek O’Brien predicting electoral defeats for the BJP.

title: 'Universal joke': Rahul Gandhi on PM Modi's foreign policy, says he's 'compromised'
content: Rahul Gandhi has sharply criticized Prime Minister Modi's foreign policy, labeling it a "personal" and "universal joke," and suggesting Modi is "compromised" by US President Trump. Gandhi also voiced concerns over rising LPG and fuel prices, warning of public suffering and questioning the Prime Minister's handling of the situation, contrasting it with the Covid-19 pandemic's tragedies.

title: How much oil does India have? PM Modi explains nation’s preparedness amid global fuel crisis
content: Prime Minister Narendra Modi assured India of sufficient crude oil storage and uninterrupted supply amidst the West Asia war's global fuel crunch. He highlighted the nation's strategic oil reserves and increased refining capacity, while emphasizing India's commitment to peace through dialogue and diplomacy in the region.

title: 392 drones and 34 missiles: Russian strikes on Ukraine disrupt key European power route
content: Russia unleashed a significant overnight assault, deploying hundreds of drones and missiles across Ukraine, resulting in at least five fatalities and widespread damage. Critical energy infrastructure was hit, impacting power links to Europe. This escalation follows Ukrainian warnings of impending large-scale attacks, with both nations reporting intensified cross-border strikes recently.

title: Madras high court to hear PIL to stall screening of 'Dhurandhar 2' until Tamil Nadu polls
content: A Public Interest Litigation has been filed in the Madras High Court seeking to halt the screening of the film 'Dhurandhar 2' in Tamil Nadu. The petitioner argues that the movie's political content violates the ongoing Model Code of Conduct. The court, acknowledging the film's release, advised the petitioner to file a formal writ petition for consideration.

title: NFL Trade Rumors: Chiefs eye reunion with $1.5M Super Bowl champ amid concerns
content: The Kansas City Chiefs are evaluating options to fix their weakened secondary after key departures in free agency. A potential reunion with a familiar veteran has emerged as a short-term solution, though concerns about age and injuries remain. With strong draft capital available, the team may prioritize younger talent while keeping experienced depth as a backup option.

title: Massive blow! RCB star ruled out of IPL 2026
content: Defending champions Royal Challengers Bengaluru will be without fast bowler Yash Dayal for IPL 2026 due to personal reasons. Director of Cricket Mo Bobat confirmed Dayal remains under contract and will receive continued support from the franchise during this challenging period. Dayal was a key bowler for RCB, contributing significantly to their 2024 playoff run and 2025 title win.

title: TGCET result 2026 out today: check Gurukul CET scorecard
content: Telangana Gurukul Common Entrance Test (TGCET) 2026 results were released today, March 24, for Class 5 to 9 admissions. Students can check their scores, ranks, and qualifying status online at tgcet.cgg.gov.in. The next steps involve certificate verification, counselling, and seat allotment based on merit.

title: Centre calls for all-party meeting amid escalating West Asia tensions
content: Amid escalating West Asia tensions and reports of an LPG crisis, the government convened an all-party meeting. Opposition leaders voiced concerns over the handling of the conflict and its impact on India's energy security. Prime Minister Modi is set to address Parliament on the economic and security implications, while defence officials reviewed preparedness

title: 'MS Dhoni should retire, he cannot be the Impact Player': Ex-India cricketer
content: Speculation surrounds MS Dhoni's role and future with Chennai Super Kings for IPL 2026. With fitness concerns and a younger squad, former cricketer Aakash Chopra suggests it might be time for the veteran to retire, paving the way for Ruturaj Gaikwad to lead. Dhoni's impact as a player versus a mentor is debated.

title: Pakistan, China, Sri Lanka see fuel prices rise as Hormuz choke fuels oil crisis
content: India is increasing coal burn to meet peak summer demand, while South Korea has relaxed limits on coal-based power. ​​Indonesia is prioritising domestic coal use over exports, tightening regional availability. Thailand, the Philippines and Vietnam are also leaning more on coal-fired generation to manage shortages.The shift is a short-term fix, but it risks worsening air pollution and delaying clean energy transitions.

title: No SC status on conversion to religions other than Hinduism, Sikhism or Buddhism: Top court
content: The Supreme Court ruled that individuals converting from Hinduism, Sikhism, or Buddhism to other religions lose their Scheduled Caste status. The top court upheld an Andhra Pradesh High Court order, stating that professing a different faith, like Christianity, disqualifies one from SC benefits and protections under the SC/ST Act. This bar is absolute, regardless of birth or caste certificates.

title: Watch: Missiles light up Tel Aviv skies as Israel’s multi-layered shield takes on Iranian strikes
content: Videos show Israeli air defense systems intercepting projectiles over central Israel amid Iran's latest ballistic missile launches. The IRGC announced "Operation True Promise 4," claiming strikes on "highly sensitive" Israeli and US-linked sites as part of its retaliatory campaign. Israel's multi-layered defense network, including Arrow, David's Sling, and Iron Dome, is actively countering these threats.

title: Air Canada collision: Flight attendant's miraculous escape after being ejected 100m from the plane
content: A miraculous survival unfolded at LaGuardia Airport when a flight attendant was ejected over 100 metres during an Air Canada Jazz plane's collision with a fire truck. While the crash tragically claimed two pilots and injured several others, the flight attendant, found strapped to her seat, is recovering from multiple fractures

title: DC playing XI for IPL 2026: Duckett vs Nissanka, who opens with KL Rahul?
content: Delhi Capitals have heavily revamped their squad for IPL 2026, spending nearly their entire purse to acquire new talent. With a blend of retained experienced players and new signings like Pathum Nissanka and David Miller, DC aims to overcome past underachievements and challenge for their maiden title.

title: Who is David Payne? English pacer signed by SRH as Jack Edwards replacement
content: Sunrisers Hyderabad has signed England pacer David Payne as an injury replacement for Jack Edwards for Rs 1.5 crore. Payne, a left-arm fast-medium bowler with extensive T20 experience and 304 wickets, joins SRH ahead of their IPL 2026 opener. He previously played one ODI for England and excelled in various T20 leagues.

title: Rajasthan Board website crashes after class 10th results declared: Check scores on TOI portal
content: The RBSE Class 10 Result 2026 was announced on March 24, but the official websites crashed due to heavy traffic from over 6 lakh students. While the overall pass percentage rose to 94.23%, many faced access issues. Students can check their scores through alternative platforms like the TOI results portal, DigiLocker, and UMANG without delays.

title: 'PSL a cruel mockery of our suffering': TTP's chilling warning to foreign players
content: Rebel groups have issued a stark warning to international cricketers, urging them to pull out of the upcoming Pakistan Super League (PSL). Citing the volatile security situation in regions like Khyber Pakhtunkhwa and Balochistan, the TTP faction claims player safety cannot be guaranteed. This threat casts a shadow over the tournament, which the PCB insists will proceed as planned.

title: Predicting Rounds 1-2 of the NFL draft: Yates finds landing spots for 64 top prospects
content: Field Yates unveils his latest NFL mock draft, projecting two full rounds. Which top prospects could go in the opening 64 picks?

title: Tiger to return with Jupiter's TGL season on line
content: Tiger Woods told ESPN that he will play in Match 2 of the best-of-three TGL finals, a decision he publicized after Jupiter Links lost a 6-5 nail-biter to Los Angeles in the opener Monday night in Palm Beach Gardens, Florida.

title: Sources: Cubs, Crow-Armstrong finalizing deal
content: The Chicago Cubs are close to locking up one of the breakout stars of last season in center fielder Pete Crow-Armstrong.

title: Cuse women's HC blasts NCAA for UConn pairing
content: Syracuse coach Felisha Legette-Jack blasted the NCAA women's basketball committee for consistently putting her teams in the UConn subregional in Storrs following the Orange's 98-45 second-round loss to the Huskies.

title: Texas rookie gets mound visit, told he made team
content: The mound visit Carter Baumler received from Rangers manager Skip Schumaker on Monday night wasn't to take the rookie right-hander out of his last spring training game, but rather to let him know he made the Opening Day roster.

title: Warriors' Moody stretchered off with knee injury
content: Warriors wing Moses Moody suffered a noncontact left knee injury late in Monday night's OT win in Dallas, exiting the floor on a stretcher.

title: Betts erupts for career-high 35 as UCLA rolls on
content: UCLA star Lauren Betts had a career-high 25 points to lead the way in an 87-68 blowout win over Oklahoma State in the second round of the NCAA tournament.

content: Azzi Fudd's "imperfectly perfect" family has been her rock through ACL tears, dog food pranks and Beyoncé on repeat. Now they're hoping for one more NCAA tournament title for UConn.

content: Whether your club enters Opening Day as the team to beat or hoping to be 2026's biggest surprise, we've got you covered.

content: Their NCAA tournament runs ended early and now it's all about next season. Here's how it's taking shape.

title: From Dowman to Messi: Picking the world's best soccer players at every age
content: Age is just a number -- except in soccer. We look at the best players from every birth year, spanning ages 16 to 38.

title: Sevilla, fighting relegation, are a shambles. Can Sergio Ramos save them?
content: Ramos may not be the most-liked player in Sevilla's history but most fans would welcome him back to take over.

title: NWSL Power Rankings: Angel City, Dash on the rise but Thorns still on top
content: Angel City and the Houston Dash are quickly making their way to the top of ESPN's NWSL Power Rankings, but their rise isn't enough to make them No. 1.

content: Some 2025 teams couldn't get a break. Others, such as Indiana, had luck and success. What changes in 2026?

content: Carlos Adames stays on top in the 160-pound rankings following a dominant title defense against Austin Williams. Here are the latest ESPN divisional rankings.

content: Manchester United are interested in signing Bayern Munich left back Alphonso Davies. Transfer Talk has the latest.

content: Participating in a debate on Bengaluru’s development, he claimed that a senior IAS officer had proposed the idea of converting the GFTS land into an executive club in consultation with a developer from Rajasthan

content: Government hails reform, opposition calls it ‘draconian’; Congress MP Jyothimani said the bill has been brought without consultations from transgender people

content: Opposition parties INC, DMK, NCP, Shiv Sena(UBT), RJD, SP, AITC, opposed the Bill saying it violated basic principles of right to human dignity laid down in the NALSA judgement

title: PSLV setbacks are opportunities to learn and strengthen system: ISRO chairman V. Narayanan
content: Mr. Narayanan inaugurated the 11th biennial conference of the ISRO Pensioners’ Association on Tuesday (March 24)

title: Immanuel Wallerstein Lecture 2026 to be held on March 26
content: The lecture, titled ‘The Emperor’s New Clothes: Delusions of Imperialism in the Twenty-First Century,’ will explore contemporary shifts in global power structures

title: Assembly Elections LIVE: ECI discusses poll preparedness with top officials of poll-going States
content: The poll authority also met with the Multi-Departmental Committee on Election Intelligence (MDCEI) to enhance coordination, curb illegal activities, and ensure smooth, secure, violence-free and inducement-free elections across poll-bound States.

title: Ponmudy moves Madras High Court to set aside BJP councillor’s complaint regarding derogatory speech against Vaishnavites, Saivites
content: A Metropolitan Magistrate at George Town had taken cognisance of the complaint on February 23, 2026 and ordered issuance of summons to the accused

title: Harish Rana, first person to be allowed withdrawal of medical treatment, dies in AIIMS
content: He was shifted from his Ghaziabad home to the palliative care unit at Dr. B.R. Ambedkar Institute Rotary Cancer Hospital at AIIMS on March 14, three days after the apex court passed the landmark judgement for Harish

title: Students lead the way with novel ideas at Vision Mysuru grand finale
content: Ideation initiatives at the grassroots hold the potential to become a transformative movement for Mysuru in the years to come, says Regional Commissioner Nitesh Patil

title: India has sufficient stock of petrol and diesel: Government
content: “Jag Vasant and Pine Gas safely crossed the Strait of Hormuz. Pine Gas is carrying 45,000 metric tonnes of LPG and is expected to reach New Mangalore Port early morning on March 27,” Special Secretary, Ministry of Ports, Shipping and Waterways said

title: Jagan thanks Centre for renewal of FCRA permission of RDT
content: The renewal will allow the RDT to continue its services in education, healthcare, environmental protection, and social development sectors

title: Officials running a ‘mafia’ to extract bribes for issuing e-Khatas in Bengaluru: R. Ashok
content: All major infrastructure projects in the city come to a grinding halt owing to a shortage of funds: BJP

content: ₹34.64 crore in cash, liquor worth ₹0.79 crore, drugs and narcotic substances worth ₹6.76 crore, precious metals worth ₹112.37 crore, and freebies worth ₹24.22 crore were seized

title: Gujarat govt. tables UCC Bill in Assembly
content: The Bill was tabled by Chief Minister Bhupendra Patel a week after a State-appointed panel submitted its final report on implementation of the UCC; the Bill proposes a common framework for marriage, succession and live-in relationships

title: Here are the big stories from Karnataka today
content: Welcome to the Karnataka Today newsletter, your guide from The Hindu on the major news stories to follow today. Curated and written by Nalme Nachiyar.

title: Five queer voices explain the impact of the Trans Amendment Bill 2026
content: The Transgender Amendment Bill is set to be discussed in Parliament today. What will be the impact of amendments to an already existing progressive act that guarantees better education, health care, and self-determination? Five members of the community who took part in a nation-wide protest in Chennai on March 23, explain the repercussions

title: ‘Love Mocktail 3’ success: How a small Kannada film withstood the ‘Dhurandhar’ storm
content: ‘Love Mocktail 3’, the latest instalment of the hit Kannada franchise from Darling Krishna-Milana Nagaraj, is winning hearts in Karnataka, weathering the challenge of the action-packed juggernaut ‘Dhurandhar: The Revenge’

content: To ease traffic congestion and promote public transport, authorities have introduced a QR code-based e-ticketing system, which includes a metro pass, allowing spectators to commute conveniently across the city

content: Telangana Senior Resident Doctors Association warned that if the legal notice is not withdrawn promptly, the association, in coordination with other medical bodies, would consider collective action

content: After the U.S. Supreme Court struck down the tariffs imposed by Donald Trump on countries across the world, how did the American President react? Will reciprocal tariffs be removed? Why does a 50% tariff on aluminium and steel imports continue?

title: Bengaluru police launch special drive against reckless riding after doctors create ruckus on road
content: Officials said that instead of chasing violators, police will record such acts and pass on the information to the concerned jurisdictional units for further action.

title: Nitish Kumar elected JD(U) president unopposed
content: The Bihar CM was already serving as the party’s president since Lalan Singh resigned from the post ahead of the Lok Sabha polls in December 2023

title: University can't restrict peaceful expression of ideas that don't align with management's ideology: Delhi High Court
content: It said a university's role is not to suppress every form of dissent but to ensure that such expression is answered and catered to

title: T.N. Assembly election: Stung by erosion in vote share, AIADMK fighting battle of perception
content: Except for the western region of Tamil Nadu, which has been the AIADMK’s traditional stronghold, the party’s performance has been patchy across the State in successive elections since 2021

title: Kerala Assembly polls 2026: Renewal of bar licenses ahead of elections shows corruption, alleges Venugopal
content: The Congress leader claims that the State government has collected bribes worth crores of rupees from bar owners for renewal of licences; he stresses on the allegation of a mutual understanding between CPI(M) and BJP for the polls

title: Bengaluru crime: Gang of three arrested for money-doubling fraud; ₹40 lakh recovered
content: Police said the accused had spent a portion of the money and distributed the remaining amount among their associates, claiming they would retrieve it later.

title: Delhi court sentences Kashmiri separatist Asiya Andrabi to life imprisonment in UAPA case
content: The court also sentenced two associates of Andrabi — Sofi Fehmeeda and Nahida Nasreen — who were also convicted for 30 years in prison in the same case

title: Telangana DCA cautions against unsupervised semaglutide use amid rising drug demand for weight loss
content: The DCA states that improper or unsupervised use of semaglutide can lead to serious health complications including acute pancreatitis, acute kidney injury, severe gastrointestinal reactions and gall bladder disease

title: Pinarayi Vijayan targeting Rahul Gandhi as part of a ‘deal’, alleges Sunny Joseph
content: The KPCC president alleges that the Chief Minister avoids criticising Prime Minister Narendra Modi while focusing attack on the Congress as he is hand in glove with the BJP

content: The government said that LPG cylinder online bookings have increased from 84% to 93% while panic bookings have reduced: from the peak of 89 lakh (13 March) to 55 lakh (19 March).

title: After Bengal Minister Says Name Not On SIR List, Questions Over Candidature
content: Md Ghulam Rabbani, the Bengal minister-in-charge of renewable energy and MLA from Goalpokhar, now faces the question of whether he can contest the assembly election next month

title: Iran Arrests 466 Over Online Activities Amid War With US And Israel
content: Iranian authorities have arrested more than hundreds over online activities that they consider to sow "propaganda in favour of the enemy".

content: The military said it had destroyed a bridge across the Litani River overnight, which it says was used by Iran-backed Lebanese militant group Hezbollah.

content: Lebanon's foreign ministry said on Tuesday it had withdrawn its approval of the Iranian ambassador's accreditation, giving him until Sunday...

content: US President Donald Trump threatened to "obliterate" Iran's power plants if Tehran does not reopen the Strait of Hormuz for shipping traffic.

title: Video: Offered Rs 4 Per Kg, Maharashtra Farmer Dumps 25 Quintals Of Tomatoes
content: Tomato growers in Jalna have been severely affected by the ongoing conflict in the Middle East, as the resulting export halt has driven tomato prices to extremely low levels.

title: Russia Launches 400 Drones Making It Biggest Attack On Ukraine In Weeks
content: Russia has escalated its war of attrition against Ukraine by hitting at least 10 locations across the country, according to Ukraine's air force.

title: Scientists Drive Antimatter On A Road Trip To Test Stability Across Route
content: European Organization for Nuclear Research (CERN) is experimenting with whether antimatter particles can remain stable during road transit trial.

title: MMA divisional rankings: Evloev is back near the top at featherweight
content: movsar Evloev was unranked in his fight with top-five featherweight lerone Murphy . the rest of the 145-pound top 10 drops down one position each . a fighter must have competed over the past 12 months or have an upcoming fight booked .

title: Breaking down the men's hockey tournament: Who will make it to Vegas?
content: the 2025-26 men's college hockey campaign has seen the balance of power firmly entrenched in the Midwest and West . the NCHC and Big Ten dominated the top of the national rankings virtually the entire season . Michigan State, which won the conference's regular-season title, also earned a no. 1 seed .

title: 'A litmus test for the system': $50 million rosters and Nebraska's big challenge
content: the house settlement established a set of rules for paying players . it was intended to prevent the top programs from spending at a pace that made it impossible for the 100-plus other schools to compete . but those top programs have aggressively pursued loopholes to build rosters that are often worth double the money schools are allowed to share directly with their players. now, those rules are facing their first real test .

title: Ranking the best possible Stanley Cup playoff first-round matchups
content: if things stay the way they are right now, we will have a ton of turnover from last season . the Buffalo Sabres, Pittsburgh Penguins, Columbus Blue Jackets, Boston Bruins, Detroit Red Wings, Anaheim Ducks , Utah Mammoth and Nashville Predators are all ready for the postseason .

title: Men's Sweet 16 preview: Keys to every team advancing in the NCAA tournament
content: college basketball reporters break down what could decide each game in the next round of the 2026 men's NCAA tournament . the hottest team in the field, winning three games in five days to go from the first four to the Sweet 16 .

title: Ready for Opening Day? Here's your guide to the offseason chaos that rocked MLB
content: the new york Mets signed the offseason's no. 1 free agent to a record deal . the two-time reigning champion los Angeles Dodgers sent shock waves through the sport . if you know every signing and trade and still aren't quite sure what to make of the chaos, we've got you covered .

title: Men's March Madness Pain Index: Whose tournament loss hurt most?
content: a team that walks off the court stunned, jerseys and towels covering tears . a fan base with high expectations and disappointment about the early exit is behind every one of those heartbroken teams . every team's exit is categorized into one of the most devastating .

title: Wemby states MVP case: Want to leave no debate
content: San Antonio Spurs star Victor Wembanyama wants to win the NBA's most Valuable Player Award . he is averaging 24.3 points, 11.2 rebounds, 3.0 assists and 3.0 blocked shots . only six players have finished a season with such numbers: Kareem Abdul-Jabbar, Hakeem Olajuwon and Patrick Ewing .

title: Barnwell on a surprising NFL free agency trend going back to 2013
content: 'the bill Barnwell Show' today, I'll try to answer that question . how often does a team sign a significant free agent, look back and say that it spent wisely? how often do premium free agents really work out?

title: What returning production looks like for the 2026 college football season
content: the more continuity and experience you return from last season, the more likely you are to improve . it's still better to return a lot of your production than a little, even if last year's headliner bombed . a combination of injuries, tactical stagnation and disappointing development held back the Tigers .

title: Women's March Madness Day 4 takeaways: How every team reached the Sweet 16

title: McCarthy: Rodgers reunion would be 'great story'
content: Aaron Rodgers will return to Pittsburgh next season to be the Steelers' starting quarterback . the new coach is well aware of the kind of story it would be . "yes, it'd be a great story," McCarthy said Monday .

title: Ranking each NHL team's top prospect: Hagens, Iginla, Martone, more
content: every NHL franchise has a prospect pool because of a lack of draft capital . some players are polished and NHL-ready, producing at high rates in other leagues, while others are early in their development with a high ceiling . the player must be under 23 and not an established NHL player .

title: Welcome to WNBA chaos: Breaking down a chock-full offseason
